name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M12660 Green] Pharrell Williams incorporates traditional elements of the brand's Damier print into this Coin card case, featuring interlaced textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo to creatively reshape the classic Monogram pattern, combining practicality with elegance. 14.5 x 1 x 8 cm (H x W x L)
